name: The Bunkers
about: The Bunkers is a 2-bay indoor golf simulator facility located in Worland, Wyoming. It leverages Trackman iO technology to provide year-round golfing experiences, featuring real-time swing and shot analytics in a modern, un-manned facility. The venue offers a range of membership options and public bookings, catering to golfers looking to practice, play virtual courses, or engage in family-friendly activities. Guests can utilize the facility from 5am to midnight daily.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Trackman iO technology providing detailed swing and ball data
Un-manned facility with extended hours from 5am to midnight
Variety of game modes and virtual courses for entertainment and skill development
Family-oriented environment suitable for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: External food and drinks are not permitted inside the simulator bays or on the artificial turf. Must be consumed at designated tables.
Consumption of alcohol is forbidden on the premises.

simulator_hardware.notes: Combines radar, infrared, and high-speed imaging for real-time club and ball analytics

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content does not specify whether clubs are provided, so you may need to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, external food and drinks are not permitted inside the simulator bays or on the artificial turf. Consumption is only allowed at designated tables.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not provide a specific time for completing 18 holes.

faq.question: Is The Bunkers kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Bunkers is family-oriented and features games like putt-putt golf, making it suitable for children. Guests under 16 must be accompanied by a parent or guardian.
